DDR5-6400.reason: Anchor Day 12 with dual-source cross-validation. DDR5 spot confirmed second consecutive increase (+3.08% two-day cumulative). Kingston -32MD obsolete=supply contraction signal. Full chain sold out + LTA lock + AI >50% TAM. Delay risk is clear and asymmetric.

DDR5-5600.reason: Anchor Day 12. DDR5 spot two consecutive increases confirm reversal but slope decelerating (+0.92% vs +2.14%). Contract v retail split 45-55% persistent. 96GB Day 10 stable. Spot uptrend adds buying pressure but deceleration suggests near-term resistance possible.

PCIe4 TLC.reason: 3.6x brand split structural Day 7. NAND full chain sold out Day 9. 6500 ION EOL Day 4. DiscTech Day 12 offline. NAND Q2 +70-75% contract + ADATA +40% downstream divergence = more price transmission in pipeline. Most urgent recommendation.
PCIe4 TLC.critical_caveat: 3.6x brand split — choosing wrong brand = 3x price difference. Samsung PM1733 (OEM bulk) vs Solidigm (channel/retail) represent fundamentally different market tiers.

PCIe5 TLC.reason: 30.72TB five-reference quad-source Day 12 — most reliable PCIe5 column. SS $17,700 Day 4 confirmed non-isolated. Small/medium capacity bands still too wide (5-8x) for reliable procurement decisions. 7.68TB Samsung band improved to 4-source $2,499-$4,600 but tracking calibration still needed.

PCIe4 QLC.reason: 61.44TB five-source Day 12 — strongest column in table. Mouser single-source +6.3% jump signals upward pressure but needs multi-day confirmation before escalating to buy_now. Full time-series $3,692→$34,356 (831%). Silicon Motion shortage to 2028. 6500 ION EOL tightens 30.72TB supply.
